title: Anyone trading spot/margin, or is it “futures forever”?
author: Severe_Waltz_1371
selftext:
If you trade **spot/margin** — why? (risk, fees, simplicity, regulations)

  
If you trade **perps/futures** — what execution “gotchas” have you hit: reduce-only surprises, funding, auto-deleveraging (ADL), liquidation edge cases, partial fills/cancellations.

  
  May we all get clean fills and steady profits📈
